name: 5.8L Glass Beverage Dispenser with Acacia Lid - Threshold™
description: Keep your guests hydrated at your next party with this Threshold Glass Beverage Dispenser with Acacia Lid. Perfect for use indoors and out, this glass dispenser can hold your signature beverages, from lemonade to punch. The acacia wood lid is easy to put on and take off, topping the glass silhouette for a sophisticated touch. Simply turn the tap handle to dispense your drink and turn it back to stop the flow. Hand wash only.
